nasb.text: Wash your heart from evil, O Jerusalem, That you may be saved. How long will your wicked thoughts Lodge within you?

esv.text: O Jerusalem, wash your heart from evil, that you may be saved. How long shall your wicked thoughts lodge within you?

cnv.text: 耶路撒冷啊！洗淨你心中的邪惡， 使你可以得救！ 你心存惡念， 要到幾時呢？

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷啊， 要洗去你内心的邪恶， 这样你才能得救。 你心怀恶念要到何时呢？
